blocker.body: Session permission layer denied `git push -u origin main` during the overnight build. All work is committed locally — a manual `git push -u origin main` from the repo root will publish everything. Alternatively, add `"Bash(git push:*)"` to `.claude/settings.json` allow rules so the wrapper can push on resume.

`.env` needs real values before anything can run end-to-end. Required keys (see `.env.example`): DATABASE_URL, R2_ACCOUNT_ID, R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID, R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, R2_BUCKET_NAME, R2_PUBLIC_URL, TRIGGER_PROJECT_ID, TRIGGER_SECRET_KEY. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY stays empty — dev-time AI calls route through OAuth Claude Code.

The 10 `FeedbackItem.key` values in `.claude/skills/cpa-grading/SKILL.md` are placeholders (knowledgeAccuracy, reasoningChain, ...). Lock the real 10 — wording, axis assignment (accounting vs consulting), and weights — and the grading schema + Zod validator will be updated to match in a single commit.

Task 4 Signal C (pHash template matching) needs reference frames for Becker's "question view" vs "feedback view". I can bootstrap from downloaded fixture videos, but Sam should confirm the templates match his Becker version before Task 4 ships.
yt-dlp isn't installed; Section 11 fixture downloads are deferred. Install via `winget install -e --id yt-dlp.yt-dlp` or let me install it on next run.

log.entry: Overnight build started. Initial blockers seeded by the playbook.
